'''Asran Headows''' was the [[Master Curator]] of the [[Galactic Museum/Legends|Galactic Museum]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] in the years leading up to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="CE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> During the Clone Wars, Asran Headows announced the creation of a special exhibit at the Galactic Museum to honor the late [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Avan Post]] by the end of the [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] year.<ref name="IC">{{InsiderCite|66|Republic HoloNet News Core Edition 14:3:22}}</ref>
